Short goal: This can be a minimal working example or an easy-to-follow simplified version of your problem. It should be a goal that you can easily meet in the next week or two to show off results.
*Replicate Results from Bonev et al. 2023, with modifications in hyperparameter set-up for training, with full understanding of reasons in design (why this and why not others), performance when things break with the use of the package `torch_harmonics`.*

Medium goal: The medium goal should be a good attempt at the main result. It may not be fully featured, but you should have some confidence in its success by the time the project presentations are due.
*Comparison with FNO in solving shallow water equation.*

Stretch goal: In case things go swimmingly, you should identify a stretch goal. This can be as more complex version of your medium goal(s) or a tricky-to-implement modification that you'd like to pursue on top of the main ideas.
